mapper.insert: INSERT INTO child (name_enc, disorder_type, org_id, guardian_user_id) VALUES (#{nameEnc}, #{disorderType}, #{orgId}, #{guardianUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name_enc, disorder_type, org_id, guardian_user_id FROM child WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name_enc, disorder_type, org_id, guardian_user_id FROM child ORDER BY id
